description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a prominent hipped roof constructed from overlapping wooden planks arranged in a chevron pattern. The exterior walls are made of vertically aligned, weathered wooden boards, giving the structure a natural, textured appearance. The cabin features multiple rectangular windows with simple, unadorned frames, distributed across all visible sides, and a single plain door. The building sits atop an octagonal wooden platform that extends outward, resembling a wraparound deck or porch. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, with no decorative elements, emphasizing practicality and integration with natural surroundings. The muted brown and gray tones of the wood suggest a structure built for durability and blending into a forested or rural environment.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a hipped chevron-patterned roof, multiple rectangular windows, and an octagonal wraparound wooden platform. The weathered wood exterior and simple design evoke a practical, natural aesthetic.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen with its hipped roof, three visible windows, and a door on the left side, all set atop an octagonal wooden platform.
description_view_1: This view shows the cabin's hipped roof, three windows, and the door now positioned more centrally, with the platform clearly visible.
description_view_2: The cabin's hipped roof and three windows are visible, with the door now on the right side, and the platform extending outward.
description_view_3: The cabin is shown with the door on the left, three windows, and the hipped roof, with the octagonal platform wrapping around.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with chevron-patterned wooden planks and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small rectangular windows symmetrically distributed on all visible sides, each window spaced evenly apart with no clustering or large groupings
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on one side of the cabin, offset from the center and adjacent to the windows
